scripts.backup:vps: TS=$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S) && ARCHIVE=adminmct-$TS.tar.gz && mkdir -p backups && tar --exclude='./backups' --exclude='./node_modules' --exclude='./dist' --exclude='./.git' -czf backups/$ARCHIVE . && ssh root@103.130.213.107 'mkdir -p /var/backups/adminmct' && scp backups/$ARCHIVE root@103.130.213.107:/var/backups/adminmct/ && echo Uploaded:/var/backups/adminmct/$ARCHIVE
scripts.deploy:full: npm run backup:vps && npm run build && npm run deploy:web && echo Deploy done:https://admin.maycongtrinhnhapkhau.com.vn
